title: Hypixel Skyblock PackHQ Books
description: Updates the book textures to work with the most recent version
body:
To preface the (most of) textures in this pack are not mine, they were all made by the PackHQ team a few years ago, I also also had to make a few new textures for the new enchanted books

Replaces every enchanted book in Hypixel Skyblock with the ones from PackHQ's pack

Every max level enchantment book also has a cool rainbow gradient (hopefully god knows i dont want to debug this any further)

Ultimate enchantments and Turbo Farming enchantments also keep the Purple and Orange outline they had respectively in PackHQ's pack

![books page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9013ac8d0d4094ef1fd4656e3301367209b118ef.png)

![books page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d7950c441afc1998aeaa943e0b08d6a862add8.png)

also its been made a bit easier to edit if you personally want to, as the whole pack is pretty modular, all of the textures are seperated so, have fun with that

![da files for example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9cdb408d006be31cdee2637857fdb602425aed0.png)
